title: Crispy Sweet French Casabe Salad
description: A gluten‑free, post‑workout salad that blends the nutty crunch of casabe chips with sweet orange segments, creamy fermented yogurt, and a honey‑lemon dressing for a fresh, French‑inspired finish.
instructions: 1. In a bowl whisk together casabe flour, water, and sea salt until a smooth dough forms.
2. Divide the dough into 12 equal portions and roll each into a thin disc about 1 mm thick.
3. Heat a non‑stick skillet over medium heat and lightly brush with olive oil.
4. Cook each disc for 2–3 minutes per side until golden and crisp, then transfer to a parchment‑lined tray.
5. Drizzle the chips with honey, toss to coat, and bake in a preheated oven at 180 °C for 5 minutes to caramelize.
6. In a small bowl whisk fermented yogurt, lemon juice, and chopped mint to make the dressing; season with sea salt to taste.
7. In a large salad bowl combine mixed greens, orange segments, avocado slices, and toasted almonds.
8. Add the crispy casabe chips and drizzle the yogurt dressing over the salad; gently toss to coat.
9. Serve immediately, garnished with additional mint leaves and a drizzle of honey if desired.
